notes: Solid Tetris implementation with proper bag randomizer, wall kicks, ghost piece, lock delay, DAS/ARR, line clear animation, scoring, and audio; minor concern with spawn Y=-1 potentially causing edge-case issues but overall very complete.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris build with proper falling, locking, line clears, preview, scoring, and pause/game-over flow, but it is not flawless due to simplified wall kicks/rotation behavior and a few nonstandard gameplay details.
